name: Wild Goat Coin
description: Wild Goat Coin (WGC) is an internet-native memecoin that has evolved into a decentralized, omnichain currency protocol. WGC is fungible across 36+ blockchain networks via LayerZero, Superchain, and zkSync Elastic Network. The protocol operates with permanently locked ETH & HYPE core liquidity pools and a deflationary, on-chain buyback and burn mechanism designed to align trading activity with long-term supply reduction.
